title: Millions Prepare For Heavy Rain As Flood Watch Issued Across Queensland | 10 News
description: Almost all of Queensland, including the south-east corner, is tonight on flood watch. Millions have been warned of the potential for significant rainfall across the weekend, with major flood levels possible. It's due to a low-pressure system moving through the state. In the past 24 hours, it has unleashed falls of more than half a metre of rain across the tropical north. title: Extinct Marsupials Rediscovered | 10 News
description: Two species of marsupial believed to be extinct for 6,000 years have been discovered alive and well in West Papua.  10’s Late News explains how the pygmy long-figured possum and ring-tailed glider are now being dubbed ‘Lazarus Taxa’.
